title: glicophyllum hasslerianum
intro: Glicophyllum hasslerianum, also known as the Hassler's glicophyllum, is a type of plant species belonging to the family of Gelsemiaceae. It is native to Paraguay and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Glicophyllum hasslerianum are typically made from the leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
